name: to_syslog_facility_code
description:
Converts the `value`, a Syslog [facility keyword](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Syslog#Facility), into a Syslog integer
facility code (`0` to `23`).

arguments.name: value
arguments.description: The Syslog facility keyword to convert.

internal_failure_reasons: `value` is not a valid Syslog facility keyword.
